benefit_active: AUTOMATIC DISCOUNT BENEFIT ACTIVE AT CHECKOUT
finish_shopping_to_unlock: COMPLETE YOUR SHOPPING TO UNLOCK YOUR ACCOUNT
slide_1_desc: Get up to 30% discount on various top motorcycle oil brands to keep your engine smooth.
slide_2_desc: Available pistons, valves, and crankshafts for Tiger, GL, and the latest automatic motorcycles.
slide_3_desc: Upgrade your motorcycle's look with quality LED lights, custom handlebars, and racing exhausts.
slide_4_desc: Free installation promo! Soft compound tires available for daily use and competition.
slide_5_desc: Socket wrenches, pullers, and torque wrenches for your DIY motorcycle maintenance at home.
feat_3_sub: Get cheap prices for pro parts
filter_desc: Get 100% precise spare part recommendations perfectly suited for your motorcycle's specifications.
exclusive_promo_desc: Get the best parts with steep discount offers today.

footer_about_desc: The most complete, cheapest, and 100% original motorcycle spare parts and accessories center in Indonesia. Serving retail and wholesale needs to improve your garage performance.

review_network_error: A connection error occurred while sending the review.
review_thanks_1: Thank you, the star review for the
review_thanks_2: component has been safely stored in the HGI SPEED database manifest. Specific rating access for this item has been permanently closed.
review_comment_placeholder: Tell us about the packing thickness, weld neatness, crank pin precision, or courier performance...

cart_empty_desc: No high-performance spare parts have been added to your order list yet.
security_guarantee: Transactions at HGI SPEED are guaranteed safe, precise, and perfectly fit your motorcycle's plug-and-play specifications.
empty_checkout_desc: You cannot proceed to checkout because there are no spare parts in your cart.
shipping_info_desc: Fill in the delivery identity and location data completely.
address_placeholder: Write the street name, house number, district, and city in detail...
info_cod: Prepare the exact cash amount for the basic shopping total when the package is delivered. Courier fees are calculated separately by field logistics.
info_transfer: HGI SPEED Bank Account (BCA: 8435XXXXXX a.n PT HGI SPEED). After placing the order, send the transaction receipt to the Admin's WA.
info_qris: The national standard electronic payment QR code will be generated automatically or sent by the admin shortly after the order data is validated.
security_desc: Shopping transactions are safe, transparent, and directly connected to the warehouse admin system.
